composition.visual_hierarchy: The eyes of both profiles immediately draw attention, followed by the distinct facial features, then the intricate details of the central organic element and the flowing hair/beards.
composition.balance: symmetric - two identical, mirrored profiles flank a central, vertically oriented organic element, creating perfect visual equilibrium.

shadows.placement: under facial features (nose, chin, brow), within the central foliage/hair

highlights.placement: on forehead, nose bridge, cheekbones, and the main body of the central element

technical_specs.depth_of_field: deep - all elements are rendered with equal sharpness, creating a flat but detailed appearance

artistic_elements.atmosphere: Evokes a sense of ancient wisdom, duality, and intricate craftsmanship, with a contemplative and symbolic tone.
artistic_elements.visual_style: structured, detailed, linear, organic forms within a symmetrical arrangement

subject_analysis.primary_subject: Two mirrored male profiles, facing outwards, with long flowing hair and beards that merge into a central organic, flame-like or foliage-like element.
subject_analysis.interaction: The two subjects are intrinsically connected and integrated by the central organic element, suggesting a shared identity or duality rather than separate entities.

hair.styling_detail: heavily styled, with clear, defined waves and curls, no product visibility, very deliberate artistic rendering of hair
hair.details: Long, flowing beards that merge with the central organic element. Hair on the head also flows into this central element, creating a unified, organic mass.

body_positioning.angle: profile view for each face, mirrored

background.spatial_depth: shallow - the subject appears as a single, flat layer against the plain white background, with depth implied only through the line work within the subject itself.

elements_detailed.item: Organic, flame-like or foliage-like central element
elements_detailed.specific_features: Composed of swirling, elongated leaf-like or flame-like shapes, rendered with parallel lines and cross-hatching, connecting the two facial profiles.

background.objects_catalog: Two mirrored male profiles, central organic/foliage element.

prompts: Highly detailed black and white engraving of two mirrored male profiles, facing outwards, with long flowing beards and hair merging into a central organic, flame-like or foliage-like motif, inspired by Renaissance woodcuts and classical mythology, intricate cross-hatching, clean white background, high contrast, Dürer style, vector art.
Symmetrical line art illustration of Janus-like figures, black ink on white, detailed hair and beard texture, central abstract organic element, clean edges, conceptual art.
generation_parameters.technical_settings: High resolution vector illustration, black ink, white canvas, no gradients, crisp lines, intricate hatching for shading, 1-bit color depth.
